title: Build a Real-World Multi-Agent AI System using LangGraph,  APIs and Memory
summary: A real-world multi-agent AI system built with LangGraph demonstrates flight, hotel, itinerary, and response agents working together for travel planning. The system integrates Llama 3.3 70B via Groq, PostgreSQL for memory, and external APIs for real-time data.
